–·_★ Solo Leveling

I'm fr fr gonna die, it's 1am and omg my parents snore louder than a hippomatuamus someone save me. I was only going for a midnight pee, I don't need to hear someone snoring down the entire hallway that's completely dark and no guidance whatsoever? Help. 🥲

Anyways, I just had an amazing oc personas idea for solo Leveling so here we are! Me sneezing, causing my dog to bark, waking everyone up at 01:07, except my parents who will not stop snoring!

ENJOYY
